Bash("/Users/vardst/Documents/projects/football highlighter/venv/bin/python" -c "
from live_monitor import LiveMonitor

# Test LiveMonitor can be created and state updated
m = LiveMonitor\(\)
m.update\(strategy=''audio'', stream_status=''CONNECTED'', segments_processed=5\)
m.update\(peak_energy=0.1234, threshold=0.0567, rolling_mean=0.05, rolling_var=0.001\)
m.update\(warmup_remaining=0\)
m.update\(is_highlight=True, highlight_info={
    ''clip_name'': ''highlight_001_20240421.mp4'',
    ''clip_path'': ''/tmp/test.mp4'',
    ''size_mb'': 12.5,
    ''segment_index'': 10,
    ''segments'': ''8-13'',
}\)

# Verify state
assert m._strategy == ''audio''
assert m._stream_status == ''CONNECTED''
assert m._segments_processed == 5
assert m._peak_energy == 0.1234
assert m._threshold == 0.0567
assert m._highlight_count == 1
assert len\(m._highlights\) == 1
assert m._highlights[0][''clip_name''] == ''highlight_001_20240421.mp4''

# Build layout \(doesn''t render, just builds\)
layout = m._build_layout\(\)
assert layout is not None

print\(''OK  LiveMonitor: creation, state updates, layout build''\)
")

Bash("/Users/vardst/Documents/projects/football highlighter/venv/bin/python" -c "
from live_detector import LiveDetector

# Test LiveDetector creation with verbose=False
d = LiveDetector\(strategy=''audio'', verbose=False, output_dir=''/tmp/test_live_highlights''\)
assert d.verbose == False
assert d.strategy == ''audio''
assert d.segments_processed == 0
assert d.highlight_count == 0
assert d.warmup_segments == 5
print\(''OK  LiveDetector: creation with verbose=False''\)

# Test LiveDetector creation with verbose=True \(default-ish\)
d2 = LiveDetector\(strategy=''combined'', verbose=True, output_dir=''/tmp/test_live_highlights2''\)
assert d2.verbose == True
assert d2.strategy == ''combined''
print\(''OK  LiveDetector: creation with verbose=True''\)

# Cleanup
import shutil
shutil.rmtree\(''/tmp/test_live_highlights'', ignore_errors=True\)
shutil.rmtree\(''/tmp/test_live_highlights2'', ignore_errors=True\)
")

Bash("/Users/vardst/Documents/projects/football highlighter/venv/bin/python" -c "
from stream_discovery import Stream

# Test Stream dataclass
s1 = Stream\(name=''ESPN 1080p'', url=''http://example.com/live''\)
assert s1.quality == ''FHD''
assert s1.is_acestream == False
assert s1.status == ''unknown''

s2 = Stream\(name=''beIN HD'', url=''http://example.com/hd''\)
assert s2.quality == ''HD''

s3 = Stream\(name=''Sky Sport 4K'', url=''http://example.com/4k''\)
assert s3.quality == ''4K''

s4 = Stream\(name=''Random Channel'', url=''http://example.com/sd/480''\)
assert s4.quality == ''SD''

s5 = Stream\(name=''Test'', url=''acestream://abc123''\)
assert s5.is_acestream == True

print\(''OK  Stream dataclass: quality inference, acestream detection''\)
")
